title: So whats going to happen with Evangelion Q and Final
display_title: So whats going to happen with Evangelion Q and Final
wikitext:
[]: So what's going to happen with Evangelion Q and Final.. Post by duexmachina » Thu Mar 11, 2010 4:54 am I read somewhere on here that they were going to be released together? or am I in for a very long wait B^/

[]: Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Thu Mar 11, 2010 5:17 am I'm not sure, but perhaps this should go here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7718&start=120 I'd like to know too, however. Maybe some people who have been here since the beginning of Rebuild could answer the following questions as well. For example, when do they usually announce the official release date and when does the marketing begin? Is it possible that 3.0 will come out this summer even though we still haven't heard anything specific?

[]: Post by Halicat » Thu Mar 11, 2010 7:40 am I've no idea but I would LOVE if 0.3 and 0.4 came out together or within short sucession of each other. I am dying to see 0.3 already!

[]: Post by duexmachina » Thu Mar 11, 2010 11:35 am thanks, you're right i probably should have looked harder first :p

[]: Post by Halicat » Thu Mar 11, 2010 12:19 pm duexmachina wrote: thanks, you're right i probably should have looked harder first :p

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Thu Mar 11, 2010 1:46 pm IDontWantNoScrub wrote: For example, when do they usually announce the official release date and when does the marketing begin? Is it possible that 3.0 will come out this summer even though we still haven't heard anything specific?

[]: Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Thu Mar 11, 2010 1:52 pm I'm not debating whether 3.0 is actually going to be released this summer, but surely, they couldn't have started working on it only recently if such a timeframe was given way back in September. http://www.evageeks.org/2009/09/rebuild-of-evangelion-3-0-to-be-released-summer-2010/

[]: Post by Legendary » Thu Mar 11, 2010 1:53 pm At this point, we don't know with 3.0 or Final. When Rebuild was first announced in '07, we were told that they (and 2.0, obviously) would be aired within a year of 1.0, and that 3.0 and Final would come together. However, 2.0 has drastically changed from the original idea for it (they only realized while making it that they could make Eva substantially different this time around), so it's possible that 3.0 will air with Final, each 45 minutes long; that 3.0 will go solo, with Final following after, each 90 minutes long; or that 3.0 will go solo and be the end, with Final being dumped for whatever reason. As for WHEN, I wouldn't be surprised if we didn't see 3.0 till Summer '11. If Final is separate, it'll probably be out within two years of 3.0.

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Mar 11, 2010 2:37 pm Personally, i'm hoping for a combined runnig time somewhere in the two hour-ish regions for Q+Final. Also, i hope that there will be some major announcement (perhaps a new trailer, even?) regarding Q when 2.22 hits the shelves. I mean come on, May will be the eleventh month since the release of 2.0. Also also, Gainax is thirty years old this year, no? I know that it's Studio Khara producing Rebuild, but it's basically Gainax Veterans Club. Q would be a nice anniversary present.

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 11, 2010 3:26 pm Legendary wrote: they only realized while making it that they could make Eva substantially different this time around

[]: Post by Legendary » Thu Mar 11, 2010 4:40 pm I don't remember. I read that from somewhere on here, that some of the greater plot changes were conceived later on.

[]: Post by duexmachina » Thu Mar 11, 2010 4:43 pm Halicat wrote: duexmachina wrote: thanks, you're right i probably should have looked harder first :p

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 11, 2010 5:49 pm Legendary wrote: I don't remember. I read that from somewhere on here, that some of the greater plot changes were conceived later on.

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 11, 2010 7:26 pm Hay guise... http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7022
